name: list_events
description: List events on the operator's Google Calendar within a time window. Provide time_min and time_max as RFC3339 datetimes; recurring events are expanded into individual instances ordered by start time. Returns a list of event objects (id, summary, start, end, status, htmlLink, attendees, ...).

time_min.description: Window start (inclusive lower bound) as an RFC3339 datetime, e.g. '2026-06-20T00:00:00Z'.

time_max.description: Window end (exclusive upper bound) as an RFC3339 datetime, e.g. '2026-06-21T00:00:00Z'.

calendar_id.description: Optional. Calendar id to query (default 'primary'). Use list_calendars to discover other calendar ids.

operator.description: Optional. If omitted, resolves to the BlackBox's current operator (single operator auto-selected; otherwise the system default). Do not hard-code an operator name.

returns: JSON array of event objects {id, summary, start, end, status, htmlLink, ...} (or an error string). An empty array means no events in the window.
notes: Requires Google Workspace connected for the operator. Both time_min/time_max must be RFC3339 datetimes (include a 'Z' or timezone offset). Results use singleEvents=True + orderBy='startTime' so recurring series are returned as individual instances in chronological order. Take an event's id and pass it to update_event / delete_event.
